o : ONote
x : Option ONote ⊕ (ℕ → ONote)
e : o.fundamentalSequence = x
⊢ o.fastGrowing =
    match (motive := (x : Option ONote ⊕ (ℕ → ONote)) → o.FundamentalSequenceProp x → ℕ → ℕ) x, ⋯ with
    | Sum.inl none, x => Nat.succ
    | Sum.inl (some a), x => fun i => a.fastGrowing^[i] i
    | Sum.inr f, x => fun i => (f i).fastGrowing i

o : ONote
x : Option ONote ⊕ (ℕ → ONote)
e : o.fundamentalSequence = x
⊢ (match (motive := (x : Option ONote ⊕ (ℕ → ONote)) → o.FundamentalSequenceProp x → ℕ → ℕ) o.fundamentalSequence,
      ⋯ with
    | Sum.inl none, x => Nat.succ
    | Sum.inl (some a), h =>
      let_fun this := ⋯;
      fun i => a.fastGrowing^[i] i
    | Sum.inr f, h => fun i =>
      let_fun this := ⋯;
      (f i).fastGrowing i) =
    match (motive := (x : Option ONote ⊕ (ℕ → ONote)) → o.FundamentalSequenceProp x → ℕ → ℕ) x, ⋯ with
    | Sum.inl none, x => Nat.succ
    | Sum.inl (some a), x => fun i => a.fastGrowing^[i] i
    | Sum.inr f, x => fun i => (f i).fastGrowing i
